overall.description: Third-person survival horror gameplay showing a character with flashlight and handgun exploring a rain-soaked urban park at night. The character moves through fallen autumn leaves, past construction barriers and scaffolding, ascending stairs near a museum building, and finally along a graffiti-covered wall, with heavy rainfall and yellow street lamp illumination throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban park path with fallen leaves

events.description: passing dark parked car on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the rainy park holding a flashlight and handgun, scanning the surroundings

entered.detail: ornate black lamppost casting yellow-green light through the rain
bare autumn tree with sparse branches silhouetted against lamplight
pavement covered with wet fallen leaves reflecting street lights
dark sedan parked along the path, partially illuminated by flashlight
low stone structure of a fountain visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a rain-soaked urban park at night, with heavy rain falling on wet pavement covered in autumn leaves. Street lamps cast a yellow-green glow through the mist, illuminating bare trees and a parked car as the character approaches a distant fountain structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction area with scaffolding and work lights

events.description: entering construction area with scaffolding and bright work lights
spotting a humanoid figure standing near the scaffolding in the distance

agents.ego_description: approaching the construction barriers cautiously, flashlight beam sweeping across the scaffolding

notable_agents.action: humanoid figure standing motionless near the scaffolding, partially illuminated by work lights

entered.detail: metal scaffolding structure with vertical poles surrounding a work area
portable construction barrier with diagonal red and white stripes
intense white work light illuminating the construction area through the rain

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow construction zone with metal scaffolding and bright work lights that cut through the rain and darkness. Red and white striped barriers block portions of the path, and a shadowy humanoid figure stands motionless in the distance near the scaffolding, creating a tense atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with stone stairs and iron fence

events.description: ascending stone stairs to elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs while hugging the right side near a metal fence, keeping flashlight aimed forward

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to an elevated path
ornate black iron fence running along the right side of the elevated walkway
large building with illuminated signage visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a flight of stone stairs to an elevated walkway bordered by an ornate black metal fence. The museum building becomes visible in the background, its illuminated signage cutting through the rainy darkness as the character moves along the elevated path.

scene_state.functional_zone: museum plaza with fountain and neon signage

events.description: approaching area with red neon signs and brighter building illumination

agents.ego_description: navigating around the fountain plaza, moving toward the museum entrance while passing neon signs

entered.detail: decorative stone fountain with multiple tiers, water reflecting the surrounding lights
bright red neon signage illuminating the museum facade
construction hoarding covered in yellow and black graffiti and concert posters

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more open plaza area in front of the museum building, where red neon signs cast a vibrant glow on the wet stone fountain. The environment shifts from natural park to urban commercial as the character approaches a construction wall covered in graffiti and concert posters.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with graffiti-covered construction hoarding

agents.ego_description: walking along the graffiti-covered wall, flashlight illuminating the posters and tags

entered.detail: large black garbage bin on the sidewalk
layered posters on the wall advertising 'POET'S' and other events

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a narrow alleyway bordered by a construction hoarding completely covered in graffiti and layered concert posters. A black trash can sits on the wet asphalt as the character moves deeper into the dimly lit passage, with the bright neon signs of the museum plaza now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban park that gradually transitions into a claustrophobic, graffiti-lined city alley. It begins on wet pavement covered in autumn leaves, moving through a yellow-green mist toward a distant fountain. As the character enters a narrow construction zone, the natural park elements give way to metal scaffolding and bright work lights, where a motionless humanoid figure looms in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends stone stairs to an elevated walkway, revealing the illuminated signage of a museum building before opening into a plaza where red neon signs reflect off a wet stone fountain. Finally, the environment narrows from the open plaza into a dimly lit alleyway, bordered by construction hoardings layered with graffiti and concert posters.
